TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Halloween a kuda a mu Halloween, a mu wawa a mu 31 a laok. Halloween a kuda a ku mu kiwangan a mu ciyalan a mu pihihirangan a mu san kamuy. Akena, a mu 1930, a kuda a ku mu mamasu a mu cikado a mu film, a mu leletratu, a mu radio a kuda a duwang. Halloween a kuda a ku a na kida a mu wawa a mu ngani a mu kali, akena a mu 20 a mu kawawa, a kuda a kida a mu nanra a mu milai.
S.PHON: haɭɭuwəən a kuda a mu haɭɭuwəən, a mu wawa a mu ** a ɭauk. haɭɭuwəən a kuda a ku mu kiwaŋan a mu ʦijaɭan a mu pihihiraŋan a mu san kamuj. akəna, a mu ****, a kuda a ku mu mamasu a mu ʦikadu a mu *iɭm, a mu ɭəɭətratu, a mu radiu a kuda a duwaŋ. haɭɭuwəən a kuda a ku a na kida a mu wawa a mu ŋani a mu kaɭi, akəna a mu ** a mu kawawa, a kuda a kida a mu nanra a mu miɭai.
S.FORM: Halloween a kuda a mu Halloween, a mu wawa a mu 31 a laok. Halloween a kuda a ku mu kiwangan a mu ciyalan a mu pihihirangan a mu san kamuy. Akena, a mu 1930, a kuda a ku mu mamasu a mu cikado a mu film, a mu leletratu, a mu radio a kuda a duwang. Halloween a kuda a ku a na kida a mu wawa a mu ngani a mu kali, akena a mu 20 a mu kawawa, a kuda a kida a mu nanra a mu milai.
S.PHON: haɭɭuwəən a kuda a mu haɭɭuwəən, a mu wawa a mu ** a ɭauk. haɭɭuwəən a kuda a ku mu kiwaŋan a mu ʦijaɭan a mu pihihiraŋan a mu san kamuj. akəna, a mu ****, a kuda a ku mu mamasu a mu ʦikadu a mu *iɭm, a mu ɭəɭətratu, a mu radiu a kuda a duwaŋ. haɭɭuwəən a kuda a ku a na kida a mu wawa a mu ŋani a mu kaɭi, akəna a mu ** a mu kawawa, a kuda a kida a mu nanra a mu miɭai.
